title: LiveBroadcast
description: A liveBroadcast resource represents an event that will be streamed, via live video, on YouTube.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#liveBroadcast.

id.description: The ID that YouTube assigns to uniquely identify the broadcast.

statistics.description: The statistics object contains info about the live broadcast.

totalChatCount.description: The number of live chat messages currently on the broadcast.
